raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic will have short- and long-term impacts on the November 2020 election.",
    "The state must send a mail ballot to every registered voter for the November election.",
    "In-person voting options must continue to be accessible to voters during the pandemic.",
    "Expanded access to vote-by-mail is a critical component in addressing the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "Counties should begin procurement of equipment and materials to allow for every registered voter in California to receive a mail ballot.",
    "Assembly Bill 860 would require every registered California voter to receive a vote-by-mail ballot for the November presidential general election.",
    "In-person voting opportunities will remain available for voters while ensuring health and safety.",
    "Senate Bill 423 would require county elections officials to establish and maintain a minimum number of polling places for the statewide general election.",
    "Safe and accessible polling places are critical to protecting voter rights.",
    "Voters will need safe and healthy in-person voting options for the November election."
  ]
}
```
